scored_papers.title: Revisiting Turner Window Axions: The Untapped Potential of NaI Dark Matter Detectors
scored_papers.abstract: The "Turner window" corresponds to axions with masses gtrsim 1 eV that have sufficiently strong couplings to matter to evade limits from the cooling of SN1987A. We show that a more complete treatment of the axion opacity in SN1987A significantly weakens prior limits, opening regions for hadronically coupled axions. NaI detectors (DAMA/LIBRA-style) can detect resonant absorption from carbon-burning stars producing 23Na thermal axions at 440 keV.
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 Turner 窓の axion 復活!SN1987A opacity 再評価で QCD axion (≳10eV) の region が再開、既設 NaI 検出器で 2 年で g_app ~ 10⁻⁶˙⁵-10⁻² を探索 ✨🔬
scored_papers.summary: 🌟 SN1987A axion opacity を精密化して Turner 窓を再評価、Milky Way 炭素燃焼星の ²³Na 熱励起 axion (440keV) を NaI で共鳴吸収検出する新提案 🔬✨

scored_papers.title: Asteroid-mass Primordial Black Holes as Dark Matter from Supersymmetry
scored_papers.abstract: We study the formation of asteroid-mass Primordial Black Holes (PBHs) as a dark matter candidate in supersymmetric extensions of the Standard Model. Heavy MSSM particles cause transient softening of the equation of state during their non-relativistic transition, enhancing PBH formation. For SUSY masses above ~10^5 GeV, the PBH mass function is enhanced in the asteroid-mass window, allowing all of DM.
scored_papers.reason: 🎉 SUSY 重粒子で w が一時 softening → asteroid-mass PBH を全 DM 化!MSSM 質量 ≳10⁵GeV、SM では同条件で観測排除 ✨🌑
scored_papers.summary: 💫 MSSM 重粒子の非相対論的遷移で状態方程式が低下し PBH 形成が増強。準スケール不変な原始摂動で asteroid 窓に PBH を全 DM として生成 🌟

scored_papers.title: Specially Embedding a Composite Axion Model
scored_papers.abstract: We present a novel framework of post-inflationary composite axion to address strong CP without the cosmological domain wall problem. Conventional composite axion models give N_DW > 1 producing stable walls. By specially embedding the confining gauge group and QCD into a larger product gauge group, N_DW is essentially set to unity in the UV. Small instanton effects induce a bias term making walls unstable.
scored_papers.reason: ✨ 後期 inflation composite axion の domain wall 問題を gauge group 特殊埋め込みで N_DW=1 に!small instanton bias で wall を不安定化 🎯🌌
scored_papers.summary: 🌟 confining gauge と QCD を larger product gauge に special 埋め込み → UV で N_DW=1、small instanton で bias を生成し domain wall を不安定化 🔬

scored_papers.title: Transient Parity Violation during Inflation: Implications for PTA Gravitational Waves
scored_papers.abstract: We investigate the consequences of a transient phase of enhanced parity violation during inflation. Modeling this phase through a time-localized Chern-Simons-like coupling, we show that it amplifies primordial gravitational waves at small scales, producing a robust spectral shape with blue growth of effective slope n_T ~ 2. This lies in the range explored by recent PTA analyses, differing from canonical SMBHB expectations.
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 inflation 中の transient parity violation で PTA GW を説明!n_T≃2 の青いスペクトル、SMBHB 起源と異なる primordial シグネチャ 🌌✨
scored_papers.summary: 🌟 時間局在 Chern-Simons 結合で primordial GW を small scale で増強、CMB 制約と整合の青色 (n_T≃2) スペクトル+線形偏光で SMBHB と区別 ✨

scored_papers.title: Nanohertz gravitational waves from the baryon-dark matter coincidence
scored_papers.abstract: The nanohertz GWs observed by PTAs may originate from a cosmological first-order phase transition at ~100 MeV. We point out that a PT at exactly those scales is predicted by the generation of the baryon asymmetry from a dark asymmetry via resonant neutron-dark matter oscillations, and prove that this PT can induce an observable GW signal compatible with all experimental constraints. Tested by LHC missing energy and neutron decays.
scored_papers.reason: 🚀 nanohertz GW (PTA) を baryon-DM coincidence で説明!resonant n-DM 振動 baryogenesis の ~100MeV PT が観測信号を出す 🎯💫
scored_papers.summary: 💫 dark asymmetry → baryon asymmetry の n-DM 振動が 100MeV first-order PT を予言、PTA GW を全制約両立で生成。LHC missing-E + n decay で検証 ✨
